item.name: Pyariyoanaan Cichlid
item.description:
This particular species of cichlid has never been documented outside of the Pyariyoanaan Plain.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This midsized freshwater fish is said to change the color of its scales based on weather and water currents. As the fisherfolk say: “When the cichlid is brown, the sun sticks around; when the cichlid is blue, rain will pass through.”
